scripts.copy:assets: npm run copy:component_scss && npm run copy:base_sass && npm run copy:xtra_sass && npm run copy:svg && npm run copy:foundation
scripts.copy:fonts:lib: shx mkdir -p dist/fonts && copyfiles -u 2 "node_modules/source-sans/WOFF*/**/*" dist/fonts && copyfiles -u 2 "node_modules/source-serif/WOFF*/**/*" dist/fonts
scripts.copy:fonts:storybook: shx rm -rf public/fonts && shx mkdir -p public/fonts && copyfiles -u 2 "node_modules/source-sans/WOFF*/**/*" public/fonts && copyfiles -u 2 "node_modules/source-serif/WOFF*/**/*" public/fonts
scripts.build:lib: npm run prebuild:lib && tsc -p tsconfig.lib.json && npm run postbuild:lib
scripts.postbuild:lib: npm run compile:styles && npm run copy:assets && npm run copy:fonts:lib || (echo 'ERROR: postbuild:lib failed. Check compile:styles, copy:assets, or copy:fonts:lib' >&2 && exit 1)
scripts.build:app: vite build || echo 'Failed to build app for deployment' >&2
scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:app
scripts.prebuild:storybook: npm run delete:dist && ts-node scripts/generate-versions.ts && npm run copy:fonts:storybook
scripts.storybook: npm run prebuild:storybook && storybook dev || echo 'Failed to start Storybook' >&2
scripts.build-storybook: npm run prebuild:storybook && storybook build || echo 'Failed to build static Storybook into storybook-static folder' >&2
scripts.build-all: npm run build && npm run build-static-storybook
